channel.title: Car Showcase Latest Updates
channel.description: RSS feed with the latest updates and improvements made to the Car Showcase project.

item.title: Improved mobile header navigation
item.description: The mobile navigation menu was improved to provide a more responsive and user-friendly experience on smaller screens.

item.title: Added RSS page and feed support
item.description: A new RSS section and XML feed were added to the project to highlight the latest changes made to the application.

item.title: Deployed project to Firebase Hosting
item.description: The Car Showcase project was deployed online using Firebase Hosting for easier access and public presentation.

item.title: Updated car brand page styling
item.description: The visual design of the brand pages was improved with better spacing, cleaner cards and a more consistent layout.

item.title: Improved chat CRUD user experience
item.description: The chat section was refined to make creating, editing and deleting content clearer and easier for users.
